items.author: mengluo123

items.title: [Steam论坛] WOD ARCHIVES RUINED
items.summary: I find it really sad how greedy the devs are for raising the price of one of the best bundles the game offers in every version; It used to include a +12 wheel at an affordable price of 980 Silver Prime, but now, with the new version, they’ve raised the price to 1,680 Silver Prime just by adding a few cores basically forcing you to top up $30 in the game, or in other cases $31, for a bundle that was previously perfectly fine and available at a good price of $15.  ːsteamthumbsdownː...
items.author: PoofNi

I am level 60+ if it matters.
items.author: Victor66

items.title: [Steam论坛] Possible bug when finishing character stories
items.summary: Twice until now, these last 2 weeks, the game became nonresponsive at the last part of the story, where you get the Posse. I got it, but I had to shut down the game first, as it wouldn't recover at all, not even after waiting for 15 minutes.
items.author: Victor66
